headline: Philips Hue’s budget-friendly Essential starter kit has hit a new low price
summary: Philips Hue's Essential starter kit is at a new all-time low price. The bundle includes four smart lights and a Hue Bridge. Other Prime Day Hue deals are still available.

headline: Plex problems prevented users from streaming movies and shows
summary: Plex services experienced major outages on Tuesday, affecting users globally. Many reported issues streaming locally hosted media. Problems were widely shared on forums and Reddit.

headline: Nintendo’s Switch 2 bundle that includes a game is $50 off
summary: The Nintendo Switch 2 console bundle, including a digital game, is $50 off. This rare discount offers greater savings than usual. Choose from games like Mario Kart World or Pokémon Pokopia.

headline: Meta accused of using biased AI targeting for mass layoffs
summary: Former Meta employees are suing the company over alleged AI-targeted layoffs. The lawsuit claims AI tools unfairly selected workers on leave for dismissal. Performance data collected by internal AI systems is cited as the basis.

headline: Pick Up a Powerful and Infinitely Reusable Cordless Electric Air Duster for $19 After Coupon
summary: Get a powerful, reusable cordless electric air duster for only $19 with a coupon. Keep your PC and electronics dust-free. This is an essential gadget for tech maintenance.

headline: The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings Pocket-Sized Book Set Gets a New Lowest Price Ever
summary: The pocket-sized Lord of the Rings and Hobbit book set has hit a new lowest price ever. This is a perfect compact collection for fantasy fans. Don't miss this incredible deal on the classic Tolkien saga.

headline: Sony Faces Anti-Trust Lawsuit From Mexican Lawmakers Over Its Decision to End Production of Physical Games
summary: Mexican lawmakers are filing an anti-trust complaint against Sony. The lawsuit targets Sony's decision to cease physical game production by 2028. Concerns are raised over competition and consumer choice.

headline: The Micro-Sized BOSGAME AMD Ryzen 5 Mini PC with 16GB of RAM and 512GB SSD Drops to $260
summary: The BOSGAME AMD Ryzen 5 Mini PC is now available for $260. This compact PC features 16GB RAM and a 512GB SSD. It offers versatility for both productivity and light gaming.

headline: Police say Ann Widdecombe killed in 'targeted attack' as motive investigated
summary: Ann Widdecombe was reportedly killed in a 'targeted attack.' Counter-terror police have a warrant to hold a 28-year-old suspect. Investigators are actively probing the motive behind the incident.

headline: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US prepares to resume blockade of Iran ports
summary: Trump has retracted his threat of a 20% fee on cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz. The US prepares to resume a blockade of Iranian ports. This move follows ongoing efforts to challenge Iran's control over the waterway.

headline: Starmer and Burnham hail Hillsborough Law as MPs give approval
summary: MPs have approved the Hillsborough Law, hailed by Starmer and Burnham. The legislation cleared the House of Commons in Sir Keir Starmer's final days as PM. This is a significant step forward for justice following the Hillsborough disaster.

headline: Scott Mills was highest-paid BBC star before sacking
summary: Scott Mills was the BBC's highest-paid star before his recent sacking. The former Radio 2 host earned approximately £745,000 last financial year. His departure follows a significant income for his role at the broadcaster.
